# Generated by openai (gpt-4o)
# Prompt: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses merge request title and description in build notifications and commit messages. This helps track which features are being deployed and generates automatic release notes. Include the MR title in deployment tags.
# Category: cicd_security

stages:
  - build
  - deploy

variables:
  NOTIFY_TITLE: "${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE}"
  NOTIFY_DESCRIPTION: "${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_DESCRIPTION}"

build_job:
  stage: build
  script:
    - echo "Building project..."
    - echo "Title: $NOTIFY_TITLE"
    - echo "Description: $NOTIFY_DESCRIPTION"
  only:
    - merge_requests

deploy_job:
  stage: deploy
  script:
    - TAG_NAME=$(echo "${NOTIFY_TITLE}" | tr ' ' '_')
    - git tag "deploy-${TAG_NAME}-${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}"
    - echo "Deploying project with tag: deploy-${TAG_NAME}-${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}"
  only:
    - merge_requests
